scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,green,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && zsh -lc 'cd backend && . .venv/bin/activate && ruff check .'
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && zsh -lc 'cd backend && . .venv/bin/activate && ruff format .'
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix frontend run format:check && zsh -lc 'cd backend && . .venv/bin/activate && ruff format --check .'
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend test && zsh -lc 'cd backend && . .venv/bin/activate && pytest -q'
